title: mailbox
doc: DRAM-triggered live register update on the x280 (poll / keypress)

params.name: set_csr
params.desc: write this value into mscratch, live (echoed in telemetry slot 4)

params.name: set_vreg
params.desc: broadcast this value into vector reg v16, live (echoed in slot 5)

params.name: vtype
params.desc: re-vsetvli to this SEW/LMUL, live (vl echoed in slot 7)
